title: Mirror the Same Item Across Multiple Boards (Without Losing Your Mind)

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Mirror Items Across Multiple Boards — Fully in Sync

Mirror Item Multiple Boards lets you mirror the same item across more than one board and keep everything perfectly in sync.

Instead of copying items or setting up multiple fragile automations, you work with one item that lives on multiple boards.

Any update made on one board reflects automatically on all the others.

What You Can Do With the App

With this app, you can:

  • Mirror a single item to multiple boards at once

  • Keep status, dates, people, text, numbers, and more columns in sync

  • Mirror subitems + updates along with parent items

  • Update the item from any board — changes sync everywhere or choose to have one-way syncing

There’s no “master board” limitation. Every mirrored item stays connected in real time.

Powerful Automations (No Manual Work)

The app also comes with ready-to-use automations that make syncing effortless:

  • When an item is created → mirror it to selected boards

  • When a status changes → mirror item to target board

  • When a person is assigned → mirror item to board

  • And 20 more!

Once automations are set, everything runs quietly in the background.

Built for Real monday.com Setups

Mirror Item Multiple Boards fits naturally into existing workflows:

  • Client boards + internal boards

  • Cross-team project tracking

  • Sales → delivery → operations handoffs

  • Leadership visibility without extra boards

Each team works in their own board, but everyone sees the same up-to-date information.

Simple Setup, Flexible Control

Setup takes just a few clicks:

  1. Select the item

  2. Choose the boards

  3. Choose to add updates+subitems

  4. Click "‘Add Item’ and you’re done!

One Item. Multiple Boards. Always in Sync.

151920×960 253 KB

If you need the same work visible across different boards — without duplicating effort or risking mismatched data — Mirror Item Multiple Boards is built exactly for that.
